title: Lessingianthus bupleurifolius
taxonomy: Lessingianthus bupleurifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Lessingianthus and is native to South America. The classification of Lessingianthus bupleurifolius includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, and its class as Magnoliopsida. This classification further breaks down into the order Asterales and the family Asteraceae, with Lessingianthus being a subfamily of Mutisieae. The species bupleurifolius is a part of the Lessingianthus genus.
